hooks.command: uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" direct guard_git_bypass.py
hooks.commandWindows: $root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; uv run --project $root python "$root/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" direct guard_git_bypass.py

hooks.command: uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" guarded-files guard_human_wip.py
hooks.commandWindows: $root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; uv run --project $root python "$root/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" guarded-files guard_human_wip.py

hooks.command: uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" files post_edit_format.py && uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" files post_edit_lint.py
hooks.commandWindows: $root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; uv run --project $root python "$root/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" files post_edit_format.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; uv run --project $root python "$root/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" files post_edit_lint.py

hooks.command: uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" direct session_baseline.py
hooks.commandWindows: $root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; uv run --project $root python "$root/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" direct session_baseline.py

hooks.command: uv run --project "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" python "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" direct stop_incomplete_guard.py
hooks.commandWindows: $root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; uv run --project $root python "$root/.codex/hooks/codex_hook_adapter.py" direct stop_incomplete_guard.py
